form.formComment: Last start 3rd (Sr2) over 1660m at this track, beaten 3.5 m by Great White (1:55.00) in NR up to 75 on March 28 at $151. Two runs back 5th (Sr2) over 2040m at Redcliffe, beaten 9 m by So Many Moments (2:30.50) in 3yo+ NR 47 to 54 on March 25 at $15. Maybe a place.

form.formComment: Last start 6th (Sr4) over 2138m at this track beaten 14 m by Path To Greatness (2:30.60) in 4yo+ B 5 NR 55 or better on April 4 at $81. At the run before 9th (Sr2) over 1660m at this track, beaten 7 m by Seaside Glory (1:56.50) in NR up to 75 on March 28 at $23. Much better gate this time and gets a chance to show his best.

form.formComment: Not far away at the last couple starts; Finished 3.5 m third behind Charge Ahead at Redcliffe over 2280m 4yo+ 5 0K/4 Starts last start. Before that was beaten a head second at Redcliffe over 1780m same class on March 26. Sure to be in the mix.

form.formComment: Last start 7th (Fr1) over 1660m at this track, beaten 23 m by Daisy Diana (1:56.00) in 4yo+ No NR M on April 4 at $17. Two runs back was driven from back in the field when 3rd (Fr4) over 1660m at this track beaten 1.75 m by Seaside Glory (1:56.50) in NR up to 75 on March 28 at $101. This looks a far sterner task.

form.formComment: Last start 5th (Fr3) over 2138m after showing early pace at this track, beaten 7 m by Ozzie Punta (2:30.80) in 4yo+ B 5 NR 55 or better on March 28 at $23. Two runs back was well back in the run when 4th (Fr6) over 1660m after being wide early at this track, beaten 6 m by Cool Night (1:54.50) in 4yo+ B 5 NR 55 or better on March 21 at $81. Hard to make a case.

form.formComment: Didn't do much last start, 5th (Fr1) over 1660m at this track, beaten 4 m by Attachment (1:55.60) in 4yo+ No NR on March 28 at $19. Before that 4th (Fr2) over 2138m at this track, beaten 9 m by Dashing (2:29.90) in 4yo+ No NR on March 21 at $34. Must do a lot more.

form.formComment: Six-year-old mare is racing in fine form. Won her last two outings at Redcliffe both over 1780m. Last start won by 3.5 m as favourite when quickly away, (Fr4) at Redcliffe (2:06.10) beating Splash Of Paynt in 3yo+ NR up to 75 on April 1 at $1.50. Expected to go well again.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Lead the event early then obtained a trail on Splash Of Paynt around the 1300m.
Had difficulty in securing clear running over the concluding stages.
